title: statistical MC: walks/confidence/shrinking/coverage-guided/adversarial/concolic
manager: The statistical model-checking suite — random walks with confidence intervals, failure shrinking, coverage-guided and adversarial exploration, and concolic (SMT-steered) walks — for the machines too big to check exhaustively. This is the pragmatic middle ground between testing and proof: you can't enumerate every state, but you can walk millions with statistical guarantees and have the tooling shrink any failure to a minimal reproduction you can actually read.
cs: statistical MC (walks + confidence + shrinking + coverage-guided + adversarial); concolic `walk --reach` (SMT-steered); fsl#485/#497/#1244-#1249; the sampling tier for un-exhaustible machines.
